title: Frontend Developer
description: Master component architecture, state management, and modern web vitals.
commonQuestions: Explain the Virtual DOM and how React reconciliation works.
What is the difference between client-side rendering (CSR) and server-side rendering (SSR)?
How do you optimize Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS) in a frontend application?
promptInjection: The user is interviewing for a Frontend Developer role. Focus on UI architecture, React, state management, performance optimization, and browser APIs.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Practice system design, database indexing, and scalable microservices.
commonQuestions: How would you design a scalable rate limiter for a public API?
Explain the differences between SQL and NoSQL databases, and when to use each.
What is the CAP theorem and how does it apply to distributed systems?
promptInjection: The user is interviewing for a Backend Engineer role. Focus on API design, database architecture, distributed systems, concurrency, and performance tuning.

title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Demonstrate expertise across the entire stack, from UI to database schemas.
commonQuestions: Walk me through the architecture of a modern Next.js application with a Postgres database.
How do you handle authentication and authorization in a full-stack web application?
Explain how you would implement real-time communication (e.g., WebSockets) in a full-stack app.
promptInjection: The user is interviewing for a Full-Stack Developer role. Focus on both frontend architecture (React/Next.js) and backend integration, including databases and APIs.

title: Data Scientist
description: Ace your interview on machine learning models, statistical analysis, and Python.
commonQuestions: Explain the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning.
How do you handle missing or imbalanced data in a dataset?
What is the bias-variance tradeoff in machine learning?
promptInjection: The user is interviewing for a Data Scientist role. Focus on statistical analysis, machine learning algorithms, data cleaning, and Python/SQL skills.

title: React Developer
description: Deep dive into React hooks, context, concurrent features, and ecosystem tooling.
commonQuestions: How does the useEffect hook work, and what are common pitfalls with dependency arrays?
Explain the difference between useMemo and useCallback.
How do you manage global state in a large-scale React application?
promptInjection: The user is interviewing specifically for a React Developer role. Ask deep technical questions about React hooks, rendering lifecycles, and component design patterns.
